Title: Retro Sci-Fi Astronaut Synthwave Pop Art T-Shirt
Description:
Embrace a cosmic journey with this vibrant retro synthwave t-shirt. Featuring a stylized astronaut floating amidst glowing purple neon waves and geometric electronic patterns, this design captures the nostalgic energy of 80s sci-fi and synthpop culture.

This tee is perfect for anyone who loves futuristic aesthetics, vaporwave art, or retro gaming vibes. Whether you're attending a themed concert, exploring a city at night, or just want a unique statement piece, this shirt will make a striking impression.

Design Details:

  • Aesthetic: Combines classic astronaut imagery with vivid synthwave color palettes (deep purples, neon pinks, and blues).
  • Style: Pop art, retro-futurism, electronic, and cosmic.
  • Material Feel: Printed on a comfortable, soft-feel crew-neck t-shirt, ideal for all-day casual wear.

It makes an excellent gift for space enthusiasts, synthwave lovers, graphic designers, or pop culture aficionados.
